hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exec('') if not fp or not any(fp.endswith(e) for e in ('.ts','.tsx','.js','.jsx')) else subprocess.run(['pnpm','exec','oxfmt','--write',fp],cwd='/home/marco/.openclaw/workspace/repos/openclaw',capture_output=True)"

sh -c '[ "$OPENCLAW_DEV_AGENT" = "1" ] || exit 0; echo "RAPPEL POST-COMPACTION: Lis ~/.openclaw/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md avant toute modification. Fichiers patch protégés (NE PAS TOUCHER): apps/android/, dispatch-from-config.ts, chrome.ts, types.whatsapp.ts, zod-schema.providers-whatsapp.ts. Bootstrap < 16k chars. atomic_write_json pour JSON. JAMAIS git push dans le repo source."'
